name: primary-checking
_comment: Primary account holder's checking. If PLAID_ACCESS_TOKEN is unset, this Item can sync via the bank-mcp subprocess fork (which holds the credentials in ~/.bank-mcp/config.json). Keep exactly ONE tokenless Item — a second tokenless Item would re-pull the same fork connection.

name: secondary-checking
_comment: A second account holder's checking. 1) Run Plaid Link to create a 2nd Item -> access token. 2) security add-generic-password -a "$USER" -s PLAID_ACCESS_TOKEN_SECONDARY -w 'access-...'. Having a token routes this Item through Plaid direct, distinct from the tokenless fork connection.
